sql:
SELECT city_name, period_range_label, period_title, start_population, end_population, population_change_pct
FROM vw_city_period_detail_with_population
ORDER BY city_name, period_order
LIMIT 25;
preview: SELECT city_name, period_range_label, period_title, start_population, end_population, population_change_pct

sql: SELECT city_name, period_label FROM vw_city_population_analysis WHERE period_label = 'Industrialisation' LIMIT 10;
preview: SELECT city_name, period_label FROM vw_city_population_analysis WHERE period_label = 'Industrialisation' LIMIT 10;

sql:
SELECT city_name, decade, absolute_growth, growth_pct
FROM vw_city_growth_by_decade
ORDER BY growth_pct DESC
LIMIT 25;
SELECT city_name, year, population FROM vw_city_population_analysis LIMIT 5;
